title: 911 Call — CFS 21-123760 — Public MP3 Release
summary: Family-authorized public MP3 derivative of the preserved official-source 911 WAV, published for listening and statement-to-record review.
source_name: Official public-safety audio supplied in the Waterbury Police and EMS archive

provenance.acquired_from: Preserved official-source WAV associated with CFS 21-123760
provenance.notes: Public MP3 derivative: mono, 8 kHz, approximately 09:16 including encoding padding. Original WAV SHA-256 remains 9b293fc87765cff780cd8f369e7096b47b6112c6c1168b259cb19ca70f5cd8c0 and remains the preservation master.

redaction_notes: The family/archive owner expressly authorized public release on July 22, 2026. A timestamped transcript remains pending. Public playback does not verify statements or establish deception, guilt, or cause of death.

revision_history.change_summary: Generated, hashed, and uploaded the public MP3 derivative under inherited anyone-with-link reader access.
Added the playable public-release page and structured provenance record.
